title: Notifications  - Device updating OFF
scenario: Device Software Update notification does not appear when notifications are disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts during background DFU process
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Ensure 'Device Software Update' notifications are turned OFF.
4. Pair the Poly Bluetooth audio device with the Android device.
5. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update.
6. Start the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
7. Put the Poly Studio Mobile app into the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
8. Observe whether any notification appears for the device firmware update.
expected: No notification appears for the device firmware update when the app is in the background.
